data.body:
STACK BUILT + committed (3 relation-chain changes on branch epic/baseborn-cricket, base origin/main ee49b4a89):
  1. 8d36 (425154160) xdist+coverage — pre-flight GREEN: make lint/typecheck pass; full -n4 --cov suite 79.94% (0 fail/0 error, only local-only yaml test deselected); integration -n4 loadgroup 75 passed, live confined.
  2. 9ad9 (853904d61) --durations=25 — verified prints 'slowest 25 durations', xdist-compatible; .test_durations gitignored.
  3. bad4 (3d9c71abe) pip cache on all 10 workflows (22 setup-python steps) — all YAML parse; every setup-python has cache:'pip'+cache-dependency-path:pyproject.toml; eval.yml manual pip cache converted to built-in.
All three: Change-Id + rebar-ticket trailer + DCO Signed-off-by present; pre-commit gate passed (lint/typecheck skipped for YAML-only changes 9ad9/bad4).
Plan reviews: epic PASS(pre-existing), 8d36 PASS+signed, 9ad9 PASS+signed(7 advisory, applied durations-on-integration + gitignore), bad4 BLOCK(AC2 timing hedge)→remediated(reworded AC operator-attested + broadened scope to all workflows)→re-review PASS+signed. NOTE: first bad4 re-review accidentally hit the GLOBAL pipx build (no agents extra)→INDETERMINATE; re-ran under venv→PASS.
Next: push stack to gerrit refs/for/main; await two votes per change; close each after Verified+1 (bottom-up); land.
